title: Suchness
definition: The Buddhist concept of seeing things as they truly are, without the filter of a self or dualistic perspective.

difficulty_levels.beginner: The Buddhist concept of seeing things as they truly are, without the filter of a self or dualistic perspective.
difficulty_levels.intermediate: The Buddhist concept of seeing things as they truly are, without the filter of a self or dualistic perspective.
difficulty_levels.expert: The ultimate realization that leads to liberation from the cycle of suffering and attainment of enlightenment.

extra_fields.insight: The ultimate realization that leads to liberation from the cycle of suffering and attainment of enlightenment.
